ios-simulator.note: Single-shot simctl capture of the running iOS app. WKWebView has no CDP, so the full DOM-driven narrative parity runs in-app via the onboarding/chat handshake legs (ios-onboarding-smoke.mjs / mobile-local-chat-smoke.mjs); see DEVICE_MATRIX.md.

android-emulator.reason: no Android device or emulator attached (`adb devices` is empty). Boot one via `bun run --cwd packages/app test:e2e:android` (auto-boots an AVD) or attach a device.
